chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4668 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.19526/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 8 3. For order on Misc. No.19527/2025 (Exemption) 4. For order on Misc. No.19528/2025 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case 02.10.2025 Mr. Ghulam Qasim Joyia advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-5. Learned counsel for the petitioner has filed a complaint to the Sindh Building Control Authority (SBCA) through the Smart Complaint Redressal Mechanism (SCRM) on 22.9.2025. This complaint is currently under process. The Director General, SBCA is directed to expedite his decision on the complaint according to the SBCA’s own SOPs. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Director General, SBCA, for compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
